statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_cost_usd // empty'); out="$model"; [ -n "$used" ] && out="$out | ctx: $(printf '%.0f' $used)%"; [ -n "$cost" ] && out="$out | $$(printf '%.4f' $cost)"; printf "%s" "$out"
